description:
## Deep Component Audit — hx-action-bar

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-action-bar/`

### Audit Scope (ALL areas — leave nothing unchecked)

1. **Design Tokens** — Verify ALL CSS custom properties use `--hx-` prefixed tokens. No hardcoded colors, spacing, typography, or timing values. Three-tier cascade. Dark mode overrides.
2. **Accessibility (A11Y)** — WCAG 2.1 AA. ARIA roles/states/properties. Keyboard navigation. Focus management. Screen reader. Reduced-motion.
3. **Functionality** — All public properties, methods, events. Edge cases. Slot behavior. Reactive updates. Event bubbling through Shadow DOM.
4. **TypeScript** — Strict mode. No `any`. Proper exports. Decorator usage.
5. **CSS/Styling** — Shadow DOM encapsulation. CSS Parts exposed/documented. No style leakage. Responsive. Host styles.
6. **CEM Accuracy** — Manifest matches actual API. All properties, events, slots, CSS parts, CSS custom properties documented.
7. **Tests** — Coverage 80%+. Rendering, properties, events, keyboard, a11y, slots, edge cases.
8. **Storybook** — All variants. Controls wired. Autodocs from CEM.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** — Works in Twig. No framework deps. Progressive enhancement.
10. **Portability** — CDN-ready. No external deps. Lazy-loadable. Tree-shakeable.
11. **wc-mcp Health Score** — No baseline. Target: 100 (A).

### Deliverable
Detailed markdown audit report. Categorize: CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH directly. Document MEDIUM+LOW for follow-up.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-action-bar
